actions.title: Publish 'What it takes to lead AI change at the world's largest law firms' to legora.com/blog
actions.rationale: OWNED·THOUGHT-LEADERSHIP has 0% Legora coverage on the 1,184 'AI adoption at BigLaw' citations across the prompt set. The keyword cluster around 'AI change management', 'legal innovation leadership', and 'AI-ready law firms' is dominated by McKinsey + Thomson Reuters editorial — but only as third-party links. An owned essay published to legora.com/blog plants Legora's flag inside the BigLaw decision-maker conversation and converts a high-intent retrieval pattern that Harvey is currently winning by default.

target.audience: GC, Innovation Lead, COO at AmLaw 100 firms

actions.title: Publish 'AI Document Review for M&A Due Diligence: What Actually Works'
actions.rationale: Buyers searching 'AI document review M&A due diligence' are mid-deal evaluators with high commercial intent — and Legora is invisible on this query. The article opens on a $1.5M tax liability hidden by a fabricated AI citation (Bloomberg, Apr 2026), grounds the case for AI in McKinsey's 20% cost / 30-50% faster cycle data, and ends with the practitioner's checklist firms ask for. OWNED·ARTICLE shows 67% gap across 2,841 due-diligence citations.

target.topic: AI document review M&A due diligence

actions.title: Publish 'How to Evaluate Legal AI Tools: A 6-Dimension Framework'
actions.rationale: Individual lawyer AI adoption hit 69% in 2026 but only 34% of firms have formally adopted — managing partners are searching for a structured way to evaluate vendors. The article reframes evaluation around the dimensions that predict ROI (workflow integration, adoption, accuracy, security, cost, vendor quality) instead of a feature checklist. OWNED·ARTICLE shows 1,932 citations on this evaluation intent and Legora appears in zero of them.

target.audience: managing partners · innovation leads · IT decision-makers

actions.title: Publish 'Outside Counsel Guidelines Are Getting Stricter — Here's How Firms Are Adapting'
actions.rationale: 50% of in-house teams now believe they're being overbilled, 79% are under pressure to cut spend, and OCGs have started covering AI disclosure, e-billing automation and mandatory AFAs. This article extends the 'billable hour' video into operational territory and is the natural pull-through for firms reading Kyle's piece. OWNED·ARTICLE shows 1,247 citations on OCG-AI intent — a topic where Legora's Word Add-in / governance story has a clear claim.

target.audience: law firm partners · legal ops · GCs

actions.title: Add JSON-LD SoftwareApplication + FAQPage schema to legora.com
actions.rationale: OWNED·HOMEPAGE shows 62% gap despite legora.com being the #5 most-retrieved domain (1,819 retrievals). Structured data closes the gap between 'LLMs read your homepage' and 'LLMs cite your brand' — Peec's headline pattern is 'cited as a source but not mentioned as a brand'.

actions.title: Turn 'The billable hour isn't dying — AI is transforming it' into a 90-second explainer
actions.rationale: Kyle Poe's Mar 25 piece on legora.com/blog/the-billable-hour-isnt-dying-but-ai-is-transforming-it makes a sharp, citable argument: AI doesn't kill the billable hour, it makes work predictable enough to price as fixed fees (72% of firms already offer alternatives, 90% at firms 50+ lawyers). UGC·YouTube and LinkedIn show 80% gap for this thesis — re-cutting the article as video opens a second citation surface for the same data points.

actions.title: Pitch tech-now.io to be included in their German legal-AI listicle
actions.rationale: EDITORIAL·LISTICLE drill-down identified tech-now.io's 'Top 10 Besten KI-Tools für Anwälte in Deutschland' as a high-leverage target — listicles regularly cited by LLMs in DACH market where Legora opened its Munich office (Mar 2026) but isn't yet in the citation graph.

target.article_title: Top 10 Besten KI-Tools für Anwälte in Deutschland

actions.title: Pitch Reuters: counter-narrative to the Harvey $11B funding story
actions.rationale: EDITORIAL·ARTICLE drill-down identified reuters.com/technology/legal-software-firm-harvey-valued-11-billion as a top-cited Harvey article. Pitch a 'European challenger' angle (Legora's $5.55B Series D, Munich/Toronto expansion) to Reuters' legal-tech reporter — same publication, balancing narrative.

actions.title: Reply in r/Lawyertalk: 'best (and most reliable) legal AI/software'
actions.rationale: UGC·Reddit drill-down identified the exact thread by URL: reddit.com/r/Lawyertalk/comments/1c6os32. This is a Score 3 high-intent thread — buyers asking the canonical evaluation question. Reply must be authentic-tone, peer-to-peer, not marketing copy.

target.thread_title: What is the best (and most reliable) legal AI/software out there?

actions.title: Outreach to Sam Mollaei, Esq. for collaboration
actions.rationale: UGC·YouTube drill-down identified Sam Mollaei, Esq. (youtube.com/@sammollaei) as a high-leverage legal-AI YouTuber. His videos are cited by Gemini and Perplexity for product-evaluation queries. Pitch: sponsored deep-dive demo of Tabular Review for solo/mid-firm audience.

actions.title: LinkedIn collab: reach out to @lani-morand-a636524b for joint content
actions.rationale: UGC·LinkedIn drill-down surfaced @lani-morand-a636524b as a high-leverage individual creator. LinkedIn is the #2 most-retrieved UGC source (4,632 retrievals). Score 3.

actions.title: Update Wikipedia: Harvey (software) page + propose Legora article
actions.rationale: REFERENCE·Wikipedia is at 100% gap. en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harvey_(software) exists but Legora has no Wikipedia article. Wikipedia is one of the highest-trust sources LLMs cite — closing this gap requires careful, neutral editing through a contributor (not direct brand edits).

actions.title: Take inspiration from G2's 'Top 10 Harvey AI Alternatives' review
actions.rationale: UGC·G2 drill-down identified g2.com/products/harvey-ai/competitors/alternatives as the canonical alternatives listing. G2 reviews are heavily cited; either get listed there or seed similar comparison content on adjacent review platforms.

target.anchor_title: Top 10 Harvey AI Alternatives & Competitors in 2026
